title: Deploy Webhook System to Production
description: Commit all webhook and validation code, create PR, test end-to-end with real GitHub webhook events.

context.body:
## Summary
Implemented GitHub webhook-based code review system.

## Changes
- Added webhook receiver server (Flask)
- Created HTML/CSS validation pipeline
- Integrated GitHub API for review comments
- Added status check blocking

## Test Plan
- [x] Webhook receives PR events
- [x] Validation pipeline catches broken CSS
- [x] Review comments post to PR
- [x] Merge blocked on failed reviews

## Deployment
- Webhook server running on port 8080
- GitHub webhook configured
- Ready for production use
